name: Calculate FTP estimate
shortDescription: Estimate FTP from a supported power data payload.
longDescription: Build an FTP estimate from stored efforts and return one representative value with a confidence note.
expectedBehavior: Returns an FTP estimate and confidence level for valid inputs.
knownRisks: Outlier intervals can skew the estimate.
notes: Initial algorithm already validated by product owner.

name: Show FTP trend chart
shortDescription: Display recent FTP points in a trend chart.
expectedBehavior: Chart loads with the latest FTP points and no blocking UI errors.

name: Compute weekly training load
shortDescription: Aggregate rides into a weekly load score.
longDescription: Use activity intensity and duration to compute weekly load totals and trend direction.
expectedBehavior: Returns weekly totals for selected periods.
knownRisks: Missing activity intensity data causes incorrect rollups.

name: Compare weekly load trends
shortDescription: Show week-over-week changes in a compact card view.
expectedBehavior: Shows current and previous load with visible delta indicator.

name: Import Strava activity
shortDescription: Fetch new activities from Strava and store locally.
longDescription: Pull activity summaries using the current token and append only items that are not already present.
expectedBehavior: New activities are available in timeline after import.

name: Deduplicate imported activities
shortDescription: Prevent duplicate activity entries during repeated imports.
expectedBehavior: Duplicate ids are skipped and import report shows ignored items.

name: Render activity timeline
shortDescription: Render recent activities in chronological order.
expectedBehavior: Timeline loads with newest activities first.

name: Filter activity timeline
shortDescription: Filter timeline by type and date range.
longDescription: Allow users to quickly narrow the timeline to the rides they want to inspect.
expectedBehavior: Selected filters apply instantly and can be reset.

name: Save profile settings
shortDescription: Persist profile values used by the product.
expectedBehavior: Changes are persisted and visible after refresh.

name: Validate profile form
shortDescription: Validate required profile fields before save.
expectedBehavior: Form blocks invalid values and highlights missing fields.
knownRisks: Edge cases around locale-specific decimal separators.

name: Toggle email notifications
expectedBehavior: User preference updates without affecting other channels.

name: Preview notification preferences
shortDescription: Show a plain-language summary of active notification settings.
notes: Planned after base notification toggles are stable.
